parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ startDate: $now.minus({days: 28}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), endDate: $now.minus({days: 1}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), dimensions: ["page"], rowLimit: 500, dataState: "final" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ startDate: $now.minus({days: 56}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), endDate: $now.minus({days: 29}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), dimensions: ["page"], rowLimit: 500, dataState: "final" }) }}

parameters.jsCode: const KILL_PATTERNS=[/\/product\//i,/\/wheel-align/i,/\/tire-balanc/i,/\/aligner/i,/\/2-post/i,/\/four-post/i,/\/scissor/i,/\/hunter/i,/\/mohawk/i,/\/rotary/i,/\/snap-on/i,/car-lifter/i,/wheel-balancing/i];const isKillUrl=(u)=>KILL_PATTERNS.some(re=>re.test(u||""));const cur=$("GSC Current 28d").first().json.rows||[];const prev=$("GSC Previous 28d").first().json.rows||[];const byUrl={};for(const r of cur){const url=r.keys?.[0];if(!url)continue;byUrl[url]=byUrl[url]||{};byUrl[url].cur={clicks:r.clicks||0,impressions:r.impressions||0,position:r.position||0,ctr:r.ctr||0};}for(const r of prev){const url=r.keys?.[0];if(!url)continue;byUrl[url]=byUrl[url]||{};byUrl[url].prev={clicks:r.clicks||0,impressions:r.impressions||0,position:r.position||0,ctr:r.ctr||0};}const decaying=[];for(const [url,m] of Object.entries(byUrl)){if(!m.cur||!m.prev)continue;if(m.prev.clicks<5)continue;const clickDelta=m.cur.clicks-m.prev.clicks;const clickPct=m.prev.clicks?clickDelta/m.prev.clicks:0;const posDelta=m.cur.position-m.prev.position;const isDecay=(clickPct<=-0.30&&m.prev.clicks>=10)||(posDelta>=5&&m.prev.position<=20);if(!isDecay)continue;decaying.push({url,prevClicks:m.prev.clicks,curClicks:m.cur.clicks,clickDeltaPct:Math.round(clickPct*100),prevPosition:Number(m.prev.position.toFixed(1)),curPosition:Number(m.cur.position.toFixed(1)),positionDelta:Number(posDelta.toFixed(1)),severity:(clickPct<=-0.50||posDelta>=10)?"HIGH":"MEDIUM"});}decaying.sort((a,b)=>(b.prevClicks*-a.clickDeltaPct)-(a.prevClicks*-b.clickDeltaPct));return decaying.slice(0,20).map(d=>({json:d}));

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: {
  subject: "Refresh \"" + ($json.title || ($json.url || "").replace(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/, "").replace(/\/$/, "").split("/").filter(Boolean).pop() || "page") + "\" — losing traffic",
  content: "ASK\nThis published page is bleeding traffic over the last 28 days. Approve to have Owl draft a refresh (new data, new examples, fresh links) for your review.\n\nWHY\nClicks: " + $json.prevClicks + " → " + $json.curClicks + " (" + $json.clickDeltaPct + "% vs prior 28 days)\nAverage rank: " + $json.prevPosition + " → " + $json.curPosition + " (slipped " + Math.abs($json.positionDelta || 0).toFixed(1) + " spots)\nPage: " + $json.url + "\n\nLikely cause: competitor pages updated with newer data, intent shifted (Google now showing different result types for these queries), or your own content references stale specs/dates.\n\nIF YOU APPROVE\nI'll add this URL to Owl's refresh queue. Owl reads the current page, pulls competitor pages now ranking above, drafts a refresh with new data + reciprocal internal links, files it as a content draft ticket for your approval.\n\nIF YOU REJECT\nI'll skip this URL for 30 days. The decay alert won't re-fire for the same page in that window.",
  hs_pipeline: "0",
  hs_pipeline_stage: "1",
  hs_ticket_priority: $json.severity || "MEDIUM",
  agent_name: "Content Decay Detector",
  recommendation_type: "Content Refresh",
  recommendation_detail: JSON.stringify({
    url: $json.url,
    title: $json.title || "",
    click_drop_pct: $json.clickDeltaPct,
    position_drop: $json.positionDelta,
    prev_clicks: $json.prevClicks,
    cur_clicks: $json.curClicks,
    prev_position: $json.prevPosition,
    cur_position: $json.curPosition
  })
} }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ startDate: $now.minus({days: 28}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), endDate: $now.minus({days: 1}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), dimensions: ["page"], rowLimit: 500, dataState: "final" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ startDate: $now.minus({days: 56}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), endDate: $now.minus({days: 29}).toFormat("yyyy-MM-dd"), dimensions: ["page"], rowLimit: 500, dataState: "final" }) }}
